_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Zodiac colour system. Locked 2026-06-30. Verified by Google Material + Adobe Leonardo. The app and every artifact must match this exactly; run code/check_app_against_tokens.py before calling anything done.

functional.use: buttons, cards, active states, controls (scrubber). ~90% of UI.

frequency.use: tiles, now-playing wave, the active-frequency identity ONLY.

brand.use: hero, loading, app icon, marketing. NOT inside app UI.

component_gradient_rules.play_buttons: neutral Control #2A2530 (quiet, not coloured — colour was too much on the cards)

distribution: 60% neutral canvas / 30% Core Purple structure / 10% frequency accents. Light mode default; dark mode supported. Frequencies are accents, never floods (except the now-playing visualiser).
